vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on /var/log/messages File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /var/log/messages, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0600 /var/log/messages

triage_decision.reason: Changing file permissions on a log file to 0600 is a standard STIG hardening step and does not affect system boot, authentication, or networking.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: Potential loss of readability for non‑root users or processes that expect broader log access
